{{Quote|Double-crossing weakling has been cooperating with the 'Helmet Squad' to steal from the Hutts.|The bounty posting by the Hutt Clan on Frissk|<ref name="BH" />}}
'''Frissk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] who became a prisoner at [[Desolation Alley]] on [[Oovo IV/Legends|Oovo IV]]. While there, he started working with the [[Helmet Squad]] to skim profits from a clan of [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], double-crossing them. When word of Frissk's duplicity reached the Hutts, they placed a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on his head which the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] claimed in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].

==Biography==
A prisoner of the [[Desolation Alley]] prison on [[Oovo IV/Legends|Oovo IV]] by [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Frissk was a criminal who at some stage worked with a [[Unidentified Hutt Clan (Frissk)|clan]] of [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]. While imprisoned, however, the criminal betrayed the Hutts he had previously worked with and began cooperating with a group of prison guards known as "[[Helmet Squad]]" who worked in the prison. The Hutts eventually became aware of Frissk's treachery and placed a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on his head offering 5,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for his capture alive but nothing for his [[Death/Legends|death]]. In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] 32 BBY, while Frissk was still imprisoned, the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] traveled to Desolation Alley. Fett entered the prison in an attempt to break out a [[Mordageen]] prisoner named [[Bendix Fust]] whom he hoped to use to get close to the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Sebolto]] who Fust had betrayed.<ref name="BH" />

{{Gamemechanics}}
While making his way to Fust's cell Fett encountered Frissk, who was meeting with a member of helmet squad known as "Shank" [[Ballax]]. Frissk and Ballax both attacked Fett but the hunter managed to subdue both of them and captured Frissk alive, claiming the bounty on him as well as the one posted on Ballax.<ref name="BH" />
{{Endgame}}
